Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event logs for normative violations and desiderata violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 follows sequence correctly no normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Desiderata credit check within 24h It was at 0930 same day fine Inform applicant within 48h Decision at 1100 inform at 1300 2h later fine Follow up call optional not present but not required

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Risk Assessment before Credit Check violates ordering rule Finalize Documentation after rejection violates rule that no finalization after rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also missing Inform Applicant before closing they did finalize doc then close case So also missing Inform Applicant step after decision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Desiderata Not relevant because already normative violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case3 Normative compliance Sequence correct Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case All steps present in order no skipping or reversing No contradictory actions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case3 Desiderata violations Credit Check more than 24 hours after application Violation of recommended time window Inform Applicant more than 48 hours after decision Violation of recommended promptness No Follow up Call before closing case optional but recommended

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case2 might be due to system error or manual override risk assessment performed early due to urgent need credit check delayed due to data retrieval issues finalization done mistakenly by staff unaware of policy could be a training issue or miscommunication

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case3 might be due to backlog high volume causing delays credit check delayed because external data source slow inform applicant delayed due to internal review or scheduling constraints follow up call omitted due to resource constraints or oversight

Name: Validation - PE
Text: While these are deviations from best practice they do not violate core process integrity except for case2 which does violate core rules and should be corrected immediately
